/bin/zsh -lc "rg -n \"@dispatch\\((Set, ImageSet|ImageSet, Set|Reals, ImageSet|ImageSet, Reals)\" sympy/sets/handlers/intersection.py; ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.sets.handlers.intersection import intersection_sets
S1=imageset(Lambda(n,n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I),S.Integers)
print(type(S1), type(S.Reals))
print('dispatch S1,R:', intersection_sets.dispatch(type(S1),type(S.Reals)))
print('dispatch R,S1:', intersection_sets.dispatch(type(S.Reals),type(S1)))
print('direct first:', intersection_sets(S1,S.Reals))
print('direct reverse:', intersection_sets(S.Reals,S1))
print('intersection:', S1.intersect(S.Reals), type(S1.intersect(S.Reals)))
print('2 in S1:', S1.contains(2), 2 in S1)
print('2 in inter:', S1.intersect(S.Reals).contains(2), 2 in S1.intersect(S.Reals))
print('S1 subset Reals:', S1.is_subset(S.Reals))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
n = symbols('n')
im0 = (n - 1)*(n + S.Half)
cases = [
('quadratic roots', n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I, S.Integers),
('mixed rational roots', n + im0*I, S.Integers),
('restricted Natural0', n + im0*(n + 1)*I, S.Naturals0),
('nonlinear expanded', n/2 + im0.expand()*I, S.Integers),
('pole removes root', n/(1/n - 1) + im0*(n + 1)*I, S.Integers),
('cancelled denominator', n/(n - 6) + (n - 3)*(n + 1)*I/(2*n + 2), S.Integers),
('all roots are poles', n/(n**2 - 9) + (n - 3)*(n + 1)*I/(2*n + 2), S.Integers),
('linear imag', n + I*n, S.Integers),
('no imag roots', n + I*(n**2 + 1), S.Integers),
('constant imag', n + 3*I, S.Integers),
('always real rational', 1/n, S.Integers),
]
for label, f, base in cases:
    s = ImageSet(Lambda(n, f), base)
    out = s.intersect(S.Reals)
    print('\\n', label)
    print('f=', f)
    print('denoms=', denoms(f))
    print('out=', out)
    print('subset=', s.is_subset(S.Reals))
    print('members(-3..3)=', [k for k in range(-3,4) if out.contains(k) is S.true])
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
n = symbols('n')
im0 = (n - 1)*(n + S.Half)
cases = [
('quadratic roots', n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I, S.Integers),
('mixed rational roots', n + im0*I, S.Integers),
('restricted Natural0', n + im0*(n + 1)*I, S.Naturals0),
('nonlinear expanded', n/2 + im0.expand()*I, S.Integers),
('pole removes root', n/(1/n - 1) + im0*(n + 1)*I, S.Integers),
('cancelled denominator', n/(n - 6) + (n - 3)*(n + 1)*I/(2*n + 2), S.Integers),
('all roots are poles', n/(n**2 - 9) + (n - 3)*(n + 1)*I/(2*n + 2), S.Integers),
('linear imag', n + I*n, S.Integers),
('no imag roots', n + I*(n**2 + 1), S.Integers),
('constant imag', n + 3*I, S.Integers),
('always real rational', 1/n, S.Integers),
]
for label, f, base in cases:
    s = ImageSet(Lambda(n, f), base)
    out = s.intersect(S.Reals)
    print('\\n', label)
    print('f=', f)
    print('denoms=', denoms(f))
    print('out=', out)
    print('subset=', s.is_subset(S.Reals))
    print('members(-3..3)=', [k for k in range(-3,4) if out.contains(k) is S.true])
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.solvers.solvers import solve_linear
im=(n-1)*(n+1)
print(Mul.make_args(im))
print([solve_linear(i,0) for i in Mul.make_args(im) if n in i.free_symbols])
print(FiniteSet(tuple([-1,1])))
print(S.Integers - FiniteSet(tuple([-1,1])))
print(S.Integers.intersect(FiniteSet(-1,1)))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import I, Lambda, S, imageset
from sympy.abc import n
s = imageset(Lambda(n, n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I), S.Integers)
r = s.intersect(S.Reals)
print('s =', repr(s))
print('intersection =', repr(r))
print('base =', repr(r.base_set) if hasattr(r, 'base_set') else None)
print('S1 subset Reals =', s.is_subset(S.Reals))
print('result subset Reals =', r.is_subset(S.Reals))
print('2 in result =', r.contains(2))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
cases=[
 n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I,
 n+(n-1)*(n+S.Half)*I,
 n/2+((n-1)*(n+S.Half)).expand()*I,
 n/(1/n-1)+(n-1)*(n+S.Half)*(n+1)*I,
 n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),
 n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),
]
for f in cases:
 nr=Dummy('n',real=True)
 _, im=f.subs(n,nr).as_real_imag(); im=expand_complex(im).subs(nr,n)
 print('\\nf=',f)
 print('im=',im,'args=',Mul.make_args(im))
 print('imag solves=',[solve_linear(q,0) for q in Mul.make_args(im) if n in q.free_symbols])
 print('denoms=',denoms(f))
 for d in denoms(f):
  print(' d',d,'args d',Mul.make_args(d),'solve d',[solve_linear(q,0) for q in Mul.make_args(d) if n in q.free_symbols], 'BUG solve im',[solve_linear(q,0) for q in Mul.make_args(im) if n in q.free_symbols])
PY"

from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n, x
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear

def proposed(self):
 f=self.lamda.expr; n=self.lamda.variables[0]; base_set=self.base_sets[0]
 nr=Dummy(n.name,real=True); re,im=f.subs(n,nr).as_real_imag(); im=expand_complex(im)
 re=re.subs(nr,n); im=im.subs(nr,n)
 lam=Lambda(n,re)
 if im.is_zero: pass
 elif im.is_zero is False: return S.EmptySet
 elif im.free_symbols "'!= {n}: return None
 else:
  sols=[solve_linear(q,0) for q in Mul.make_args(im) if n in q.free_symbols]
  xx, xis=zip(*sols)
  if xx and all(q==n for q in xx):
   base_set &= FiniteSet(*xis)
  else:
   base_set &= ConditionSet(n,Eq(im,0),S.Integers)
 for d in denoms(f):
  if d.has(n):
   sols=[solve_linear(q,0) for q in Mul.make_args(d) if n in q.free_symbols]
   if sols:
    xx, xis=zip(*sols)
    if xx and all(q==n for q in xx):
     base_set -= FiniteSet(*xis)
    else:
     base_set -= ConditionSet(n,Eq(d,0),S.Integers)
 return imageset(lam,base_set)

im=(n-1)*(n+S.Half)
cases=[
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I),S.Integers), FiniteSet(-1,1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n+im*I),S.Integers), FiniteSet(1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n+im*(n+1)*I),S.Naturals0), FiniteSet(1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n/2+im.expand()*I),S.Integers), ImageSet(Lambda(x,x/2),ConditionSet(n,Eq(n**2-n/2-S.Half,0),S.Integers))),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n/(1/n-1)+im*(n+1)*I),S.Integers),FiniteSet(S.Half)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),S.Integers),FiniteSet(-1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),S.Integers),S.EmptySet),
]
for a,e in cases:
 try:r=proposed(a)
 except Exception as exc:r=f'"'{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}'
 print('\\ninput',a,'\\n got',r,'\\n exp',e,'\\n equal',r==e)
PY"

./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
from sympy.simplify.radsimp import numer
from sympy.sets.conditionset import ConditionSet
from sympy.sets.sets import Union

def solution_union(exprs, sym):
    sols=[]
    for i in exprs:
        x, xis = solve_linear(i, 0, [sym])
        if x == sym:
            sols.append(FiniteSet(xis))
        else:
            sols.append(ConditionSet(sym, Eq(i, 0)))
    return Union(*sols)

ims = [
(n-1)*(n+1),
(n-1)*(n+S.Half),
(n-1)*(n+S.Half)*(n+1),
(n-1)*(n+S.Half).expand(),
(n-1)*(n+S.Half)*(n+1),
(n-3)*(n+1)/(2*n+2),
]
for im in ims:
    print(im, 'numer factors=', Mul.make_args(numer(im)), 'solutions=', solution_union(Mul.make_args(numer(im)),n))
PY"

from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
from sympy.simplify.radsimp import numer
from sympy.sets.conditionset import ConditionSet
from sympy.sets.sets import Union

def solution_union(exprs, sym):

        x, xis = solve_linear(i, 0, [sym])
        if x == sym:
            sols.append(FiniteSet(xis))
        else:
            sols.append(ConditionSet(sym, Eq(i, 0)))
    return Union(*sols)

ims = [
(n-1)*(n+1),
(n-1)*(n+S.Half),
(n-1)*(n+S.Half)*(n+1),
(n-1)*(n+S.Half).expand(),
(n-1)*(n+S.Half)*(n+1),
(n-3)*(n+1)/(2*n+2),

for im in ims:

from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n, x
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
from sympy.simplify.radsimp import numer
from sympy.sets.conditionset import ConditionSet

def solution_union(exprs, sym):
    sols=[]
    for i in exprs:
        sx, value = solve_linear(i, 0, [sym])
        if sx == sym:
            sols.append(FiniteSet(value))
        else:
            sols.append(ConditionSet(sym, Eq(i, 0)))
    return Union(*sols)

def proposed(expr, base):
    n_ = Dummy(n.name, real=True)
    f_ = expr.subs(n, n_)
    re, im = f_.as_real_imag()
    im = expand_complex(im)
    re = re.subs(n_, n)
    im = im.subs(n_, n)
    if im.is_zero:
        pass
    elif im.is_zero is False:
        return S.EmptySet
    elif im.free_symbols "'!= {n}:
        return None
    else:
        base &= solution_union(Mul.make_args(numer(im)), n)
    base -= solution_union(denoms(expr), n)
    return imageset(Lambda(n, re), base)

im=(n-1)*(n+S.Half)
cases=[
(n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I,S.Integers,FiniteSet(-1,1)),
(n+im*I,S.Integers,FiniteSet(1)),
(n+im*(n+1)*I,S.Naturals0,FiniteSet(1)),
(n/2+im.expand()*I,S.Integers,ImageSet(Lambda(x,x/2), ConditionSet(n,Eq(n**2-n/2-S(1)/2,0),S.Integers))),
(n/(1/n-1)+im*(n+1)*I,S.Integers,FiniteSet(S.Half)),
(n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),S.Integers,FiniteSet(-1)),
(n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),S.Integers,S.EmptySet),
]
for expr,base,expected in cases:
    got=proposed(expr,base)
    print(got, got==expected, '"'expected=',expected)
PY"

from sympy.sets.conditionset import ConditionSet

def solution_union(exprs, sym):

    for i in exprs:
        sx, value = solve_linear(i, 0, [sym])
        if sx == sym:
            sols.append(FiniteSet(value))
        else:
            sols.append(ConditionSet(sym, Eq(i, 0)))

    im = expand_complex(im)

    base -= solution_union(denoms(expr), n)

cases=[
(n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I,S.Integers,FiniteSet(-1,1)),
(n+im*I,S.Integers,FiniteSet(1)),
(n+im*(n+1)*I,S.Naturals0,FiniteSet(1)),

(n/(1/n-1)+im*(n+1)*I,S.Integers,FiniteSet(S.Half)),
(n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),S.Integers,FiniteSet(-1)),
(n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2),S.Integers,S.EmptySet),
]
for expr,base,expected in cases:
    got=proposed(expr,base)
    print(got, got==expected, '"'expected=',expected)

from sympy import I, Lambda, S, imageset
from sympy.abc import n
s1 = imageset(Lambda(n, n + (n - 1)*(n + 1)*I), S.Integers)
r = s1.intersect(S.Reals)
print('S1:', s1)
print('2 in S1:', 2 in s1)
print('intersection:', r)
print('intersection args:', r.args)
print('2 in intersection:', 2 in r)
print('subset Reals:', s1.is_subset(S.Reals))
PY"

from sympy import *
from sympy.abc import n, x
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
from sympy.simplify.radsimp import numer

def merged(self):
 f=self.lamda.expr; n=self.lamda.variables[0]; base_set=self.base_sets[0]
 nr=Dummy(n.name,real=True); re,im=f.subs(n,nr).as_real_imag(); im=expand_complex(im)
 re=re.subs(nr,n); im=im.subs(nr,n); lam=Lambda(n,re)
 if im.is_zero: pass
 elif im.is_zero is False:return S.EmptySet
 elif im.free_symbols "'!= {n}:return None
 else:
  im0=S.EmptySet
  for q in Mul.make_args(numer(im)):
   xx,xi=solve_linear(q,0,[n])
   if xx==n: im0 |= FiniteSet(xi) & base_set
   else: im0 |= ConditionSet(n,Eq(q,0),base_set)
  base_set=im0
 for d in denoms(f):
  xx,xi=solve_linear(d,0,[n])
  if xx==n: base_set -= FiniteSet(xi)
  else: base_set -= ConditionSet(n,Eq(d,0),base_set)
 return imageset(lam,base_set)
im=(n-1)*(n+S.Half)
cases=[
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I),S.Integers), FiniteSet(-1,1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n+im*I),S.Integers), FiniteSet(1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n+im*(n+1)*I),S.Naturals0), FiniteSet(1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n/2+im.expand()*I),S.Integers), ImageSet(Lambda(x,x/2),ConditionSet(n,Eq(n**2-n/2-S.Half,0),S.Integers))),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n/(1/n-1)+im*(n+1)*I),S.Integers),FiniteSet(S.Half)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),S.Integers),FiniteSet(-1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),S.Integers),S.EmptySet),
]
for a,e in cases:
 r=merged(a); print(r, r==e)
PY'

from sympy.abc import n, x
from sympy.core.function import expand_complex
from sympy.solvers.solvers import denoms, solve_linear
from sympy.simplify.radsimp import numer

def merged(self):
 f=self.lamda.expr; n=self.lamda.variables[0]; base_set=self.base_sets[0]
 nr=Dummy(n.name,real=True); re,im=f.subs(n,nr).as_real_imag(); im=expand_complex(im)
 re=re.subs(nr,n); im=im.subs(nr,n); lam=Lambda(n,re)
 if im.is_zero: pass
 elif im.is_zero is False:return S.EmptySet
 elif im.free_symbols "'!= {n}:return None
 else:
  im0=S.EmptySet
  for q in Mul.make_args(numer(im)):
   xx,xi=solve_linear(q,0,[n])
   if xx==n: im0 |= FiniteSet(xi) & base_set
   else: im0 |= ConditionSet(n,Eq(q,0),base_set)
  base_set=im0
 for d in denoms(f):
  xx,xi=solve_linear(d,0,[n])
  if xx==n: base_set -= FiniteSet(xi)
  else: base_set -= ConditionSet(n,Eq(d,0),base_set)
 return imageset(lam,base_set)
im=(n-1)*(n+S.Half)
cases=[
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n+(n-1)*(n+1)*I),S.Integers), FiniteSet(-1,1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n+im*I),S.Integers), FiniteSet(1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n+im*(n+1)*I),S.Naturals0), FiniteSet(1)),

 (imageset(Lambda(n,n/(n-6)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),S.Integers),FiniteSet(-1)),
 (imageset(Lambda(n,n/(n**2-9)+(n-3)*(n+1)*I/(2*n+2)),S.Integers),S.EmptySet),
]
for a,e in cases:
 r=merged(a); print(r, r==e)
PY'
